steps.title: Spot the operational details
steps.content: The opening sentences introduce a general behavior—some birds lay eggs in other nests. The underlined sentence then provides specific details about how this behavior is executed: female cuckoos lay eggs quickly, timed for when the other birds are away foraging.

steps.title: Match the function to the answer
steps.content: The underlined sentence provides the operational details of how female cuckoos execute the egg-laying behavior described earlier. The other options incorrectly claim the sentence introduces physical features (A), describes nest appearance (B), or explains how other birds react (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
